seo.intro: Search Engine Optimisation (SEO) services are essential for businesses aiming to rank higher on Google and other search engines, attract organic traffic, and convert visitors into customers. A well-executed SEO strategy improves your website's visibility, builds credibility, and ensures your business appears in front of people actively searching for your products or services. SEO is not a one-time task — it requires ongoing optimisation, keyword research, technical audits, content creation, and link building to maintain and improve your rankings over time.

offerings.title: On-Page SEO
offerings.desc: Optimising website content, meta titles, descriptions, header tags, internal linking, and URL structure to improve search engine rankings and user experience.

offerings.title: Off-Page SEO & Link Building
offerings.desc: Building high-quality backlinks from authoritative websites, guest posting, and digital PR to boost domain authority and search rankings.

offerings.title: Technical SEO
offerings.desc: Fixing crawl errors, improving site speed, mobile responsiveness, schema markup, XML sitemaps, and Core Web Vitals for better indexing.

offerings.title: Local SEO
offerings.desc: Optimising Google Business Profile, local citations, NAP consistency, and geo-targeted keywords to rank in local search and Google Maps.

offerings.title: Keyword Research & Strategy
offerings.desc: In-depth research to identify high-volume, low-competition keywords relevant to your business and target audience.

offerings.title: SEO Content Writing
offerings.desc: Creating keyword-optimised blog posts, landing pages, and website content that attracts organic traffic and establishes industry authority.

offerings.title: SEO Audit & Reporting
offerings.desc: Comprehensive website audits to identify issues, track keyword rankings, monitor traffic, and provide actionable monthly reports.

offerings.title: E-Commerce SEO
offerings.desc: Specialised SEO for online stores including product page optimisation, category structure, and schema markup for rich snippets.

pricingTiers.includes: Basic on-page SEO, keyword research, Google Business Profile optimisation, monthly reporting
Advanced on-page & off-page SEO, link building, content creation, technical audits, bi-weekly reporting
Full-scale SEO including local, national & e-commerce SEO, dedicated SEO manager, weekly reporting, competitor analysis

benefits: Increased Organic Traffic — Drive more visitors without paying for each click
Higher Search Rankings — Appear on page 1 of Google for your target keywords
Better Brand Credibility — Top-ranking websites are perceived as more trustworthy
Cost-Effective Long-Term Results — SEO delivers compounding returns over time
Targeted Local Reach — Attract customers actively searching in your city
Improved User Experience — SEO improvements also enhance website usability
Measurable ROI — Track every keyword, ranking, and conversion with detailed analytics
Competitive Advantage — Outrank competitors who are not investing in SEO
howToChoose: Assess Your Current Rankings — Know where you stand before investing
Define Your Target Keywords — Identify what your customers are searching for
Evaluate Agency Experience — Look for proven results in your industry
Ask About Their SEO Process — Avoid agencies that promise overnight results
Check Case Studies & Reviews — Real results from real clients matter
Understand Pricing vs. Value — Cheap SEO often means black-hat tactics that can get you penalised
Ensure Transparent Reporting — Monthly reports should be detailed and actionable
whyNeeded: 93% of online experiences begin with a search engine
75% of users never scroll past the first page of search results
Local SEO drives foot traffic and phone calls for local businesses
Organic search delivers 5.3x more traffic than paid social media
SEO leads have a 14.6% close rate compared to 1.7% for outbound leads
Your competitors are already investing in SEO — don't fall behind

types.title: Local SEO
types.desc: Focuses on ranking your business in local search results and Google Maps for geo-specific queries.

types.title: National SEO
types.desc: Targets broader, nationwide keywords to build authority and visibility across the country.

types.title: E-Commerce SEO
types.desc: Optimises online stores with product schema, category pages, and conversion-focused content.

types.title: Technical SEO
types.desc: Addresses website infrastructure, speed, mobile-friendliness, and crawlability issues.

types.title: Content SEO
types.desc: Focuses on creating and optimising high-quality content to rank for informational and transactional queries.

types.title: Enterprise SEO
types.desc: Large-scale SEO strategies for businesses with thousands of pages and complex website architectures.

social-media.intro: Social media marketing services help businesses build a strong presence on platforms like Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, and YouTube. A strategic social media approach increases brand awareness, drives engagement, generates leads, and builds a loyal community around your brand. With billions of active users on social media, businesses that fail to maintain a consistent and engaging social presence risk being invisible to their target audience.

offerings.title: Social Media Strategy
offerings.desc: Developing a comprehensive social media plan aligned with your business goals, target audience, and brand identity.

offerings.title: Content Creation & Design
offerings.desc: Creating eye-catching graphics, reels, stories, carousels, and video content tailored for each platform.

offerings.title: Community Management
offerings.desc: Engaging with your audience through comments, DMs, and conversations to build brand loyalty and trust.

offerings.title: Paid Social Advertising
offerings.desc: Running targeted ad campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn to drive traffic, leads, and conversions.

offerings.title: Influencer Marketing
offerings.desc: Connecting your brand with relevant influencers to reach new audiences and build credibility.

offerings.title: Social Media Analytics
offerings.desc: Tracking engagement, reach, follower growth, and conversion metrics with detailed performance reports.

offerings.title: Platform Management
offerings.desc: Managing daily posting, scheduling, hashtag strategy, and trend capitalisation across all platforms.

offerings.title: Reputation Management
offerings.desc: Monitoring brand mentions, responding to reviews, and managing your online reputation across social channels.

pricingTiers.includes: 2-3 platforms, 12-15 posts/month, basic content creation, monthly analytics
3-4 platforms, 20-25 posts/month, reels & stories, community management, paid ad management
All platforms, 30+ posts/month, video production, influencer outreach, dedicated social media manager

benefits: Increased Brand Awareness — Reach millions of potential customers on social platforms
Higher Engagement Rates — Build meaningful connections with your target audience
Cost-Effective Lead Generation — Social ads can deliver leads at lower costs than traditional advertising
Improved Customer Loyalty — Consistent engagement builds trust and repeat business
Real-Time Customer Feedback — Understand what your audience wants through direct interactions
Enhanced Website Traffic — Drive qualified traffic from social platforms to your website
Competitive Insights — Monitor what competitors are doing and stay ahead
Measurable Results — Track every impression, click, and conversion with detailed analytics
howToChoose: Identify Your Target Platforms — Not every business needs to be on every platform
Define Your Content Style — Ensure the agency understands your brand voice
Check Their Portfolio — Look for creative, engaging content in their past work
Ask About Reporting — You should receive detailed analytics, not just vanity metrics
Evaluate Their Ad Expertise — Paid social requires different skills than organic
Look for Industry Experience — Agencies familiar with your industry deliver faster results
Understand Their Team Structure — Know who will manage your accounts daily
whyNeeded: 4.9 billion people worldwide use social media actively
54% of social browsers use social media to research products before buying
Social media advertising spending is projected to exceed $300 billion globally
Brands with strong social presence see 23% higher revenue growth
Instagram alone has over 2 billion monthly active users
Social media is the #1 channel for brand discovery among Gen Z and millennials

types.title: Organic Social Media
types.desc: Building your following and engagement through consistent, high-quality unpaid content.

types.title: Paid Social Advertising
types.desc: Running targeted ad campaigns with specific objectives like leads, sales, or brand awareness.

types.title: Social Media Content Production
types.desc: Creating professional photos, videos, reels, and graphics for social platforms.

types.title: Influencer Marketing
types.desc: Partnering with influencers to amplify your brand message to their engaged audiences.

types.title: Social Commerce
types.desc: Selling products directly through social platforms with shoppable posts and integrated stores.

types.title: Social Media Analytics & Reporting
types.desc: Tracking and analysing social performance to continuously improve strategy.

google-ads.intro: Google Ads (formerly Google AdWords) is the most powerful pay-per-click advertising platform, enabling businesses to appear at the top of search results instantly. A well-managed Google Ads campaign drives targeted traffic, generates qualified leads, and delivers measurable ROI. Whether you are looking to dominate local search, reach customers across the country, or sell products online — Google Ads provides the fastest path to visibility and conversions.

offerings.title: Google Search Ads
offerings.desc: Text-based ads that appear at the top of Google search results when users search for your target keywords.

offerings.title: Google Display Ads
offerings.desc: Visual banner ads shown across Google's network of 2 million+ websites to build brand awareness.

offerings.title: Google Shopping Ads
offerings.desc: Product listing ads with images, prices, and reviews that appear for e-commerce product searches.

offerings.title: YouTube Video Ads
offerings.desc: Video ad campaigns on YouTube to reach audiences with engaging visual content.

offerings.title: Remarketing Campaigns
offerings.desc: Re-engaging visitors who have previously visited your website but didn't convert.

offerings.title: Performance Max Campaigns
offerings.desc: AI-powered campaigns that serve ads across all Google channels for maximum performance.

offerings.title: Landing Page Optimisation
offerings.desc: Creating and optimising dedicated landing pages to maximise ad conversion rates.

offerings.title: Google Ads Audit
offerings.desc: Comprehensive review of existing campaigns to identify waste, improve quality score, and reduce CPC.

pricingTiers.includes: 1-2 campaigns, keyword research, ad copy creation, basic landing page, monthly reporting
Multiple campaign types, A/B testing, remarketing, conversion tracking, bi-weekly optimisation
Full-funnel strategy, all ad formats, custom landing pages, dedicated PPC manager, weekly reporting

benefits: Instant Visibility — Appear on page 1 of Google within hours of launching
Highly Targeted Traffic — Reach users actively searching for your products or services
Measurable ROI — Track every click, call, and conversion with precise attribution
Flexible Budget Control — Set daily budgets and adjust spending in real-time
Fast Results — Generate leads and sales immediately unlike organic strategies
Geo-Targeting — Show ads only to users in your target city or region
Remarketing Capability — Re-engage users who visited but didn't convert
Competitive Edge — Outbid competitors and capture their market share
howToChoose: Check Google Ads Certification — Ensure the agency is a Google Partner
Ask for Case Studies — Real campaign results with actual ROI numbers
Understand Their Bidding Strategy — Manual vs automated, ROAS targets
Clarify Fee Structure — Flat fee, percentage of ad spend, or performance-based
Ask About Quality Score Optimisation — This directly impacts your cost per click
Ensure Conversion Tracking — Proper tracking setup is non-negotiable
Review Their Reporting Frequency — Weekly or bi-weekly reports are ideal
whyNeeded: Google processes 8.5 billion searches every day
Businesses earn an average of $2 in revenue for every $1 spent on Google Ads
65% of all clicks on commercial intent keywords go to paid ads
Google Ads delivers the highest purchase intent traffic of any platform
Local businesses using Google Ads see 200% higher store visits
PPC visitors are 50% more likely to purchase than organic visitors

types.title: Search Ads
types.desc: Text ads triggered by keyword searches — ideal for capturing high-intent leads.

types.title: Display Ads
types.desc: Visual ads across Google's display network for brand awareness and retargeting.

types.title: Shopping Ads
types.desc: Product listing ads for e-commerce businesses with images and pricing.

types.title: Video Ads
types.desc: YouTube pre-roll and in-stream ads for engaging video marketing.

types.title: App Promotion Ads
types.desc: Campaigns designed to drive app installs and engagement.

types.title: Performance Max
types.desc: AI-driven campaigns that optimise across all Google channels automatically.

website-development.intro: Website development services encompass everything from designing a visually stunning website to building a high-performing, SEO-friendly, and mobile-responsive web application. Your website is the digital storefront of your business — it's often the first impression a potential customer has of your brand. A professionally developed website not only looks great but also loads fast, ranks well on search engines, and converts visitors into customers through strategic UX/UI design.

offerings.title: Custom Website Design
offerings.desc: Bespoke, brand-aligned website designs created from scratch with modern UI/UX principles.

offerings.title: WordPress Development
offerings.desc: Feature-rich WordPress websites with custom themes, plugins, and content management capabilities.

offerings.title: E-Commerce Development
offerings.desc: Online stores built on Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom platforms with payment integration and inventory management.

offerings.title: Landing Page Design
offerings.desc: High-converting landing pages optimised for lead generation, product launches, and ad campaigns.

offerings.title: Web Application Development
offerings.desc: Custom web apps with complex functionality using React, Next.js, Node.js, and modern frameworks.

offerings.title: Website Redesign
offerings.desc: Modernising outdated websites with fresh design, improved performance, and better user experience.

offerings.title: Website Maintenance & Support
offerings.desc: Ongoing updates, security patches, performance monitoring, and content updates.

offerings.title: SEO-Optimised Development
offerings.desc: Building websites with clean code, fast load times, schema markup, and SEO best practices baked in.

pricingTiers.includes: 5-7 page business website, responsive design, contact form, basic SEO, 1 month support
Custom design, 10-20 pages, CMS integration, advanced SEO, speed optimisation, 3 months support
Custom web app or e-commerce store, payment integration, admin dashboard, API integration, 6+ months support

benefits: Professional First Impression — A well-designed website builds instant trust and credibility
24/7 Online Presence — Your website works for your business around the clock
Higher Conversion Rates — Strategic UX design turns more visitors into customers
Mobile-Responsive Design — Perfect experience on every device from desktop to mobile
SEO-Ready Architecture — Built-in optimisation for better search engine rankings
Scalable & Future-Proof — Modern tech stack that grows with your business
Faster Load Times — Optimised performance reduces bounce rates and improves rankings
Competitive Advantage — Stand out from competitors with a superior digital experience
howToChoose: Review Their Portfolio — Look for designs that match your industry and style
Check Tech Stack Expertise — Ensure they work with modern technologies
Ask About SEO Practices — Development and SEO must go hand-in-hand
Understand Post-Launch Support — Websites need ongoing maintenance and updates
Clarify Ownership & Hosting — Ensure you own the code and domain
Check Mobile Responsiveness — Every website must be perfectly mobile-friendly
Ask About Page Speed — Fast-loading websites rank better and convert more
whyNeeded: 75% of users judge a company's credibility based on website design
53% of mobile users abandon sites that take longer than 3 seconds to load
A well-designed website increases conversion rates by up to 200%
88% of online consumers won't return to a website after a bad experience
Businesses with websites grow 40% faster than those without
Your competitors already have professional websites — you need one too

types.title: Corporate Websites
types.desc: Professional business websites that showcase your company, services, and brand story.

types.title: E-Commerce Stores
types.desc: Online shopping platforms with product catalogues, payment gateways, and order management.

types.title: Landing Pages

types.title: Web Applications
types.desc: Complex, interactive web apps with custom functionality and user dashboards.

types.title: Portfolio Websites
types.desc: Showcase websites for creatives, photographers, and agencies to display their work.

types.title: Blog & Content Websites
types.desc: Content-driven websites with CMS integration for publishing articles and resources.

graphic-design.intro: Graphic design services transform your brand vision into compelling visual assets that communicate your message, attract attention, and drive engagement. From social media graphics and marketing collateral to brand identity systems and packaging design, professional graphic design is the foundation of effective visual communication. In a world where consumers are bombarded with content, standout design is what separates brands that get noticed from those that get ignored.

offerings.title: Logo & Brand Identity Design
offerings.desc: Creating distinctive logos, colour palettes, typography systems, and brand guidelines that define your visual identity.

offerings.title: Social Media Graphics
offerings.desc: Designing engaging posts, stories, carousels, and cover images optimised for each social platform.

offerings.title: Marketing Collateral
offerings.desc: Brochures, flyers, posters, banners, and presentations that communicate your brand message effectively.

offerings.title: Packaging Design
offerings.desc: Eye-catching product packaging that stands out on shelves and reinforces your brand identity.

offerings.title: UI/UX Design
offerings.desc: Designing intuitive user interfaces and experiences for websites and mobile applications.

offerings.title: Infographic Design
offerings.desc: Transforming complex data into visually appealing, easy-to-understand infographics.

offerings.title: Print Design
offerings.desc: Business cards, letterheads, merchandise, signage, and all print materials.

offerings.title: Motion Graphics
offerings.desc: Animated graphics for social media, presentations, and video content.

pricingTiers.includes: Logo design, business card, basic social media templates
Complete brand identity, social media kit, marketing collateral, style guide
Full brand system, packaging, UI/UX design, motion graphics, ongoing retainer

benefits: Strong Brand Recognition — Consistent, professional design makes your brand memorable
Higher Engagement — Visually appealing content gets more likes, shares, and clicks
Professional Credibility — Quality design signals professionalism and trustworthiness
Better Conversion Rates — Well-designed marketing materials convert more effectively
Consistent Brand Experience — Unified visual language across all touchpoints
Stand Out from Competition — Unique design differentiates you in a crowded market
Save Time & Resources — Professional designers deliver faster and better than DIY tools
Versatile Assets — Designs that work across digital, print, and social platforms
howToChoose: Review Their Design Portfolio — Style should match your brand vision
Check Industry Experience — Understanding your market matters for effective design
Ask About the Design Process — Briefing, concepts, revisions, and final delivery
Understand File Deliverables — You should receive editable source files
Discuss Brand Guidelines — Good designers create systems, not just one-off designs
Check Revision Policy — Ensure adequate revision rounds are included
Evaluate Communication Style — Clear communication leads to better design outcomes
whyNeeded: First impressions are 94% design-related
Consistent brand presentation increases revenue by up to 23%
Visual content is 40x more likely to be shared on social media
65% of people are visual learners — design communicates faster than text
Colour alone increases brand recognition by 80%
Professionally designed brands command higher prices and customer trust

video-editing.intro: Video editing services transform raw footage into polished, professional content that captivates audiences and drives engagement. In the age of short-form content, reels, and video-first platforms, high-quality video editing is no longer optional — it's essential. From corporate videos and product demos to social media reels and YouTube content, professional video editing enhances your brand's storytelling and helps you stand out in a crowded digital landscape.

offerings.title: Corporate Video Editing
offerings.desc: Professional editing for company profiles, testimonials, event coverage, and internal communications.

offerings.title: Social Media Reels & Shorts
offerings.desc: Fast-paced, attention-grabbing short-form videos optimised for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.

offerings.title: YouTube Video Editing
offerings.desc: Full-length video editing with intros, outros, transitions, thumbnails, and SEO-optimised descriptions.

offerings.title: Product & Ad Videos
offerings.desc: Commercial-grade product videos and advertisement edits for digital and TV campaigns.

offerings.title: Motion Graphics & Animation
offerings.desc: Animated text, lower thirds, transitions, and visual effects to enhance video content.

offerings.title: Colour Grading
offerings.desc: Professional colour correction and grading to achieve cinematic or brand-specific visual aesthetics.

offerings.title: Podcast Video Editing
offerings.desc: Editing podcast recordings with multi-cam switching, captions, and highlight clips.

offerings.title: Wedding & Event Editing
offerings.desc: Cinematic editing of wedding films, event highlights, and documentary-style content.

pricingTiers.includes: Basic cuts, transitions, background music, subtitles, 1-3 minute videos
Advanced editing, motion graphics, colour grading, sound design, 5-10 minute videos
Cinematic editing, VFX, custom animations, multi-camera editing, 10+ minute videos

benefits: Higher Engagement — Video content gets 1200% more shares than text and images combined
Professional Brand Image — Polished videos build credibility and trust
Increased Conversions — Landing pages with video see 80% higher conversion rates
Better Social Media Performance — Video posts get 48% more views than static content
Storytelling Power — Video is the most effective medium for emotional brand storytelling
SEO Benefits — Video content improves dwell time and search engine rankings
Versatile Content — One video can be repurposed across multiple platforms
Cost-Effective Marketing — Professional editing maximises the value of your raw footage
howToChoose: Review Their Showreel — Quality of past work is the best indicator
Check Platform Expertise — YouTube editing differs from Instagram Reels
Ask About Turnaround Time — Fast delivery is crucial for social media content
Understand Revision Policy — How many rounds of revisions are included
Discuss Style & Aesthetic — Ensure they can match your brand's visual style
Check Software Expertise — Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects
Evaluate Music & Sound Design — Audio quality is as important as visuals
whyNeeded: 82% of all internet traffic is video content
People spend 88% more time on websites with video
Social media algorithms heavily favour video content
Video marketers get 66% more qualified leads per year
96% of people have watched an explainer video to learn about a product
Short-form video is the #1 content format for ROI in marketing

branding.intro: Branding services go far beyond logo design — they encompass the complete strategy, identity, and positioning that defines how your business is perceived in the market. A strong brand creates emotional connections with customers, differentiates you from competitors, and drives long-term loyalty and revenue growth. Professional branding involves strategic research, visual identity development, brand messaging, and consistent application across all customer touchpoints.

offerings.title: Brand Strategy
offerings.desc: Defining your brand's mission, vision, values, positioning, target audience, and competitive differentiation.

offerings.title: Logo Design
offerings.desc: Creating distinctive, versatile logos that embody your brand's personality and work across all media.

offerings.title: Visual Identity System
offerings.desc: Developing a complete visual system including colour palette, typography, imagery style, and iconography.

offerings.title: Brand Guidelines
offerings.desc: Comprehensive brand books that ensure consistent application of your brand across all touchpoints.

offerings.title: Brand Messaging & Voice
offerings.desc: Defining your brand's tone of voice, key messages, taglines, and communication framework.

offerings.title: Brand Naming
offerings.desc: Creative naming services for businesses, products, and services with trademark research.

offerings.title: Rebranding
offerings.desc: Strategic brand refresh or complete overhaul to modernise your image and market positioning.

offerings.title: Brand Collateral Design
offerings.desc: Business cards, letterheads, presentations, and all branded materials.

pricingTiers.includes: Logo design, basic brand guidelines, business card, colour palette
Brand strategy, logo, complete visual identity, brand guidelines, collateral design
Full brand strategy, naming, visual identity, messaging framework, brand book, multi-touchpoint rollout

benefits: Strong Market Differentiation — Stand out from competitors with a unique brand identity
Customer Trust & Loyalty — Professional branding builds emotional connections and repeat business
Premium Pricing Power — Strong brands can command higher prices
Consistent Brand Experience — Guidelines ensure cohesive presentation everywhere
Attract Better Talent — Top employees want to work for well-branded companies
Easier Marketing — A clear brand makes all marketing more effective
Business Valuation — Strong brands significantly increase company value
Customer Recognition — Memorable branding ensures instant brand recall
howToChoose: Review Brand Portfolio — Look for variety, creativity, and strategic thinking
Ask About Their Process — Good branding starts with research, not design
Check Strategy Capabilities — Branding is strategy first, visuals second
Understand Deliverables — Brand guidelines, source files, and usage rights
Ask for Client References — Speak with past clients about their experience
Evaluate Cultural Fit — The agency should understand your brand's values
Discuss Long-Term Support — Branding is an ongoing process, not a one-time project
whyNeeded: Consistent branding increases revenue by 23%
77% of consumers buy based on brand name over product name
It takes 5-7 impressions for someone to remember your brand
Branded companies see 3.5x higher brand visibility
64% of consumers cite shared values as the primary reason for brand loyalty
Strong branding reduces customer acquisition costs significantly

branding-packaging.intro: Branding and packaging design services create the complete visual identity and product presentation that drives purchase decisions. Your packaging is often the first physical interaction a customer has with your brand — it must communicate quality, tell your story, and stand out on crowded shelves. Combined with strategic branding, effective packaging design transforms products into experiences and builds the kind of brand recognition that drives repeat purchases.

offerings.desc: Eye-catching packaging designs that reflect your brand and appeal to your target audience.

40% of online shoppers share unboxing experiences on social media

lead-generation.intro: Lead generation services focus on attracting and converting potential customers into qualified business leads through targeted digital marketing campaigns. Whether you need B2B or B2C leads, a systematic lead generation strategy ensures a consistent pipeline of prospects who are genuinely interested in your products or services. From landing page optimisation and paid advertising to email marketing and CRM integration, lead generation is the engine that drives business growth.

offerings.desc: Running Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns optimised specifically for lead capture and cost-per-lead efficiency.

offerings.title: Landing Page Development
offerings.desc: Creating high-converting landing pages with compelling copy, forms, and CTAs designed to capture leads.

offerings.title: Email Marketing Campaigns
offerings.desc: Automated email sequences that nurture leads through the sales funnel from awareness to conversion.

offerings.desc: Setting up and integrating CRM systems to track, score, and manage leads effectively.

offerings.desc: Geo-targeted campaigns to generate leads from specific cities, areas, or regions.

offerings.title: Lead Qualification & Scoring
offerings.desc: Implementing lead scoring systems to prioritise high-quality leads for your sales team.

offerings.title: Conversion Rate Optimisation
offerings.desc: A/B testing, form optimisation, and funnel analysis to maximise lead capture rates.

music-release.intro: Music release and distribution services help artists, labels, and content creators get their music onto all major streaming platforms, build an audience, and monetise their creative work. From Spotify and Apple Music to YouTube Music and Amazon Music, professional music distribution ensures your tracks reach global listeners while retaining your rights and royalties. Combined with strategic marketing, a well-planned music release can transform independent artists into chart-topping successes.

offerings.title: Music Distribution
offerings.desc: Distributing your music to 150+ streaming platforms including Spotify, Apple Music, Amazon Music, YouTube Music, and more.

offerings.title: Release Strategy & Planning
offerings.desc: Strategic planning for single releases, EP launches, and album campaigns with timeline and pre-save campaigns.

offerings.title: Spotify Playlist Pitching
offerings.desc: Pitching your music to Spotify editorial and independent playlist curators for increased streams.

offerings.title: Music Marketing & Promotion
offerings.desc: Social media campaigns, influencer partnerships, and paid ads to promote your release.

offerings.title: Music Video Production
offerings.desc: Producing professional music videos that complement your release and boost visibility.

offerings.title: Artist Branding
offerings.desc: Creating a cohesive visual identity for artists including logos, album art, and social media aesthetics.

offerings.title: Royalty Management
offerings.desc: Tracking and collecting royalties from all platforms and performance rights organisations.

offerings.title: YouTube Channel Optimisation
offerings.desc: Setting up and optimising YouTube artist channels for maximum visibility and monetisation.

ai-influencer-management.intro: AI influencer management services leverage artificial intelligence and data-driven strategies to identify, manage, and optimise influencer marketing campaigns at scale. AI-powered tools analyse millions of influencer profiles, predict campaign performance, detect fake followers, and automate outreach — making influencer marketing more efficient, transparent, and results-driven. This modern approach to influencer management ensures your brand partners with the right creators for maximum impact and ROI.

offerings.title: AI Influencer Discovery
offerings.desc: Using AI algorithms to identify the most relevant influencers for your brand based on audience demographics, engagement rates, and content alignment.

offerings.title: Campaign Management
offerings.desc: End-to-end management of influencer campaigns from briefing and content approval to posting and performance tracking.

offerings.title: AI Performance Prediction
offerings.desc: Predicting campaign outcomes including reach, engagement, and conversion rates before launching.

offerings.title: Fake Follower Detection
offerings.desc: AI-powered auditing of influencer accounts to identify fake followers, bots, and inflated metrics.

offerings.title: Content Strategy & Briefing
offerings.desc: Creating detailed content briefs and creative guidelines that align with your brand goals.

offerings.title: Micro-Influencer Campaigns
offerings.desc: Managing campaigns with multiple micro-influencers for authentic, high-engagement reach.

offerings.title: ROI Tracking & Attribution
offerings.desc: Advanced tracking with promo codes, UTM parameters, and affiliate links to measure true campaign ROI.

offerings.title: Long-Term Ambassador Programs
offerings.desc: Building ongoing relationships with brand ambassadors for consistent, authentic promotion.
